character_designs.name_cn: 北境共生兽通用多状态角色板
character_designs.character: Northern Beastfolk Alliance Symbiotic Beast Archetypes
character_designs.identity: Reusable multi-state modeling board for eight Northern covenant beast types used in siege, transport, tunneling, scouting, static-shock threat, and group hunting shots.

body_and_role_policy.relationship_lock: The beasts are covenant partners raised, fed, soothed, and negotiated with by Northern tribes. They are not mindless monsters, disposable mounts, or a single beast horde.
body_and_role_policy.scale_lock: Every large beast must include human or beastfolk scale references. Mammoth towers over humans from knee to belly height; rhino is low and wall-like; turtle is a black-ice platform; wyvern is larger than a human but not dragon-scale.
body_and_role_policy.shared_harness_logic: Harnesses are low-technology and worn: rawhide rope, old wood yokes, bone tags, old iron caps, dark blood oath cords, frost-cracked leather, blood-salt bags, bone-flute cords, and old scar bindings.
body_and_role_policy.badge_policy: Existing Wanshou emblem language may appear only as a tiny physical bonewood oath knot, rope charm, or tool-carved sliver. It must not become a new badge, crest, logo, banner, shield emblem, or animal mark.
body_and_role_policy.low_magic_policy: Heat mist, static arcs, blue survival fire reflections, and dream-contract cues must remain short, local, physical, and restrained.

constant_anchors: visible old scar or pressure mark

state_designs.name_cn: 破门猛犸 / 撞门状态
state_designs.scale: Shoulder height 3.8-4.5 meters, 6-9 tons; human soldiers reach only knee to lower belly height.
state_designs.body: Massive woolly mammoth with extremely thick brow bone, high shoulder ridge, short powerful neck, huge front mass, and slow crushing stride.
state_designs.silhouette: Towering front-heavy triangle with iron-wrapped tusks, heavy forehead, and blackstone-snow dust around the legs.
state_designs.required_interaction: A Blackfang axeman and a bone-flute handler stay near the front quarter; one handler touches an old forehead scar or feeds blood salt after impact.
visual_notes: tusks must be wrapped in practical old iron, not polished ceremonial metal
forehead bone and shoulder ridge must read as siege impact anatomy
Blackfang axemen follow the footsteps to cut abatis and door braces
no full faction emblem on the beast

state_designs.name_cn: 岩背犀 / 低宽冲撞状态
state_designs.body: Low, wide rhinoceros-like siege beast with blackstone armor-like back plates, blunt horn, thick nearly immobile neck, and unstoppable forward weight.
state_designs.silhouette: Compressed horizontal wedge: broad chest, thick shoulders, short legs, black rock-plated back, and blunt horn pointed forward.
state_designs.required_interaction: Ironhorn shield-wall soldiers guard both sides, while a shaman soothes neck pain with bone flute, herb smoke, and palm pressure after the door strike.
visual_notes: must feel low, broad, and hard to stop
neck should show limited turning range
pain after impact is important; it is not an invulnerable machine
avoid fantasy plated monster armor

state_designs.name_cn: 冰湖甲龟 / 移动盾墙状态
state_designs.scale: Shell height 1.8-2.4 meters, shell width 4-6 meters, 8-14 tons.
state_designs.body: Huge low turtle with a thick flat shell that reads as a moving black-ice platform.
state_designs.silhouette: Flat wide shield platform with slow legs under the shell, shell-edge rails, and shield soldiers crouched on top.
state_designs.required_interaction: Handlers use short bone-flute tones and shell-side tapping to direct slow movement; shield soldiers, a small ballista, injured fighters, or bridge planks may ride the shell.
visual_notes: must read as a bridge or moving shield wall rather than a generic turtle
shell top needs load-bearing logic
human scale and shell width must be obvious
no decorative giant turtle deity styling

state_designs.name_cn: 披甲牦牛群 / 后勤拖运状态
state_designs.body: Frost-covered long-haired yaks with thick necks, low heads, heavy chest, and practical leather armor across forehead and breast.
state_designs.silhouette: Two or three broad shaggy transport beasts dragging siege timber, grain sacks, ice bridge boards, or wounded stretchers.
state_designs.required_interaction: Ironhorn or logistics handlers check rope pressure marks, feed blood salt, and lead the herd through deep hoof tracks and white breath.
visual_notes: war exhaustion should show through rope marks, breath vapor, and deep hoof prints
not a heroic cavalry mount
logistics load must be visible
avoid pure white romantic snow herd

state_designs.name_cn: 地热冰蟒 / 局部潜入状态
state_designs.body: Long python-like creature with blue-black scales, faint heat mist between scale seams, and rubbed belly marks from moving through stone cracks and drainage channels.
state_designs.silhouette: Partial body only: coils and head edge entering a wall crack, with scale close-ups and vibrating blackstone blocks.
state_designs.required_interaction: An Ice-scale snake handler guides it by low bone-flute notes, palm-on-wall vibration listening, and blood-salt grains near a foundation crack.
visual_notes: do not show a full-screen giant snake
focus on partial scales, heat mist, belly abrasion, and wall movement
the threat is foundation collapse, not monster spectacle
no bright venom magic

state_designs.name_cn: 裂风飞龙 / 投绳侦察状态
state_designs.scale: Body length 3-4 meters, wingspan 6-9 meters, 180-320 kilograms; bigger than humans but not dragon-scale.
state_designs.body: Light-boned wyvern with lean chest, visible wing joints, patched wing membrane edges, and old scars from rope work.
state_designs.silhouette: Diagonal wing-and-rope shape with ground or wall handler, rope loops, small fire-pot rig, and patched membrane.
state_designs.required_interaction: Snowfeather handlers use rope rings and short bone-flute or whistle commands for rope dropping, fire-pot delivery, scouting, and return control.
visual_notes: must not become a giant dragon
numbers are rare; show one or two at most in the board
wing patches and rope rings carry the identity
no large air force spectacle

state_designs.name_cn: 冻原雷蜥 / 低魔电弧状态
state_designs.scale: Body length 4-6 meters, shoulder height 1.4-1.8 meters, 800-1500 kilograms.
state_designs.body: Low tundra lizard with wet-snow reflective scales, heavy back fins that store static charge, clawed feet in slush, and cautious head angle.
state_designs.silhouette: Low crawling body beside iron chain or gate hardware; dorsal fins create the main read, with tiny short arcs near wet metal.
state_designs.required_interaction: Handlers keep distance and guide it with bonewood poles and blood-salt pouches toward wet iron, while short static arcs snap and vanish.
visual_notes: static arcs must be brief and local
do not make it a sci-fi electric monster
wet snow and old iron should explain the effect
avoid neon lightning

state_designs.name_cn: 霜狼群 / 共猎追击状态
state_designs.scale: Shoulder height 0.9-1.2 meters, 80-130 kilograms; between giant wolf and small warhorse.
state_designs.body: Long-legged deep-chested wolves with sharp muzzles, alert ears, strong paws, and a white mane running from neck back to tail root.
state_designs.silhouette: Disciplined three-wolf pack with a White-mane wolfkin rider or whistle handler assigned to each visible wolf.
state_designs.required_interaction: A wolfkin handler or rider makes eye contact with the lead wolf, touches an old scar, or gives a short whistle cue before night raid or beacon interception.
visual_notes: every wolf must have a corresponding handler, rider, or whistle cue
pack discipline matters more than feral aggression
wolves are larger than normal but not horse-sized monsters
avoid lone snarling wolf logo imagery

detail_panels.purpose: Lock mammoth forehead identity and covenant handling.
detail_panels.notes: Old iron tusk cap, forehead bone flute cord, blood-salt bag, rawhide knots, and old scar touch.

detail_panels.purpose: Lock rockback rhino material and pain response.
detail_panels.notes: Blackstone-like back plates, blunt horn wrap, thick neck, herb cloth, shaman palm-pressure point.

detail_panels.purpose: Lock ice lake turtle as mobile shield wall and bridge platform.
detail_panels.notes: Flat black-ice shell, old wood rail, shield soldier positions, ballista or stretcher tie points.

detail_panels.purpose: Lock armored yak herd logistics language.
detail_panels.notes: Forehead and breast leather armor, drag ropes, yoke, grain bags, ice bridge planks, wounded stretcher.

detail_panels.purpose: Keep geothermal ice python partial and physical.
detail_panels.notes: Blue-black scale close-up, faint heat mist, rubbed belly, wall crack, vibrating stone dust.

detail_panels.purpose: Lock riftwind wyvern as rare rope and scouting beast.
detail_panels.notes: Wing membrane rings, old wound patches, rawhide rope, small fire-pot rig, signal whistle.

detail_panels.purpose: Keep tundra thunder lizard low-magic and non-sci-fi.
detail_panels.notes: Dorsal fins, wet snow reflection, old iron chain, tiny short static arcs, handler distance.

detail_panels.purpose: Lock frost wolf pack identity and paired handler rule.
detail_panels.notes: White mane ridge, rawhide collar, bone whistle, tracking rope, old scar touch and eye contact.
Human, Blackfang axeman, Ironhorn shield soldier, shaman, Snowfeather handler, and the eight beast size silhouettes.

detail_panels.purpose: Carry project material and color continuity.
detail_panels.notes: Ochre grass, frozen earth grey, wind-eroded brown, dark hide, bone white, old wood, old iron, dark blood red, blue heat mist, blackstone snow dust.

negative_rules: all beasts same body with swapped horns
